titles.title: DSWL package: a Python implementation of the Debiased Spatial Whittle Likelihood

institution.institution_name: Queen Mary University of London, United Kingdom
School of Economics, University of New South Wales, Australia
Princeton University, United States of America
Ecole Polytechnique Fédérale de Lausanne, Switzerland
Princeton University, United States of America

citation.author: Guillaumin
citation.journal_title: Journal of the Royal Statistical Society Series B: Statistical Methodology
